usage: Campaign Factory can use these clusters as selectable reference patterns.

clusters.label: caption led visual / curiosity gap / short meme caption

audioRecommendations.fallbackInstruction: Use a current native platform sound that matches the caption mood; avoid hard-burning unknown audio into the file.

promptTemplate.visualBrief: simple vertical shot designed around readable meme caption overlay
